title: Department Manager Vacancy at Croma Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Croma Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Croma Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Croma Digital Technologies:
Croma Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma Digital Technologies!
